title: Incendium Textures Reimagined
description: A repaint of the Incendium item textures the from Sparkles resource pack
body:
This resource pack "reimagines" the textures of the nether overhaul datapack, Incendium. Aims to give each item more personality and enhance their details.

Additionally some swords have been resized: Blazing Hatchet, Withersbane, and Scarlet Dagger

### Notes
- To use, you'll need the resource pack for Incendium: [Sparkles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sparkles)
- Place Incendium Textures Reimagined above the Sparkles resourcepack in your resource pack order.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0fdb6dccb882cfb0d70a91207a96ed5b974a6e9_0.webp)
